description: Power supply symbol — marks a named voltage rail on the schematic

pins.name: PWR
pins.requirements: All VCC symbols with the same label are electrically connected — same net

common_mistakes: Two different voltage rails must use different labels (e.g. VCC_3V3, VCC_5V, VCC_12V) — same label = same net
Always add a decoupling capacitor at every VCC connection to an IC
notes: Use net labels to connect power rails without drawing wires across the schematic. Common labels: VCC, VDD, V3V3, V5V, V12V, VBAT.
